name: Rambda (Faster Ramda Alternative)

auth.notes: Local FP utility library; no auth

agent_readiness.notes: Faster, smaller Ramda alternative with ~90% of Ramda's API. Auto-curried functions, point-free style, immutable operations. R.pipe(), R.compose(), R.map(), R.filter(), R.reduce(), R.assoc(), R.pick(), R.omit(), R.groupBy(), R.sortBy(). TypeScript types. Tree-shakeable. ~200KB smaller bundle than Ramda. Not 100% Ramda-compatible (some edge case differences). rambdax extension adds extra utilities. Remeda is a better modern choice if starting fresh (TypeScript-first, no currying required).

gotchas: Not 100% Ramda API compatible — edge case differences
FP paradigm (currying, point-free) has learning curve
Remeda or es-toolkit may be better for new TypeScript projects
Some Ramda functions missing or behave differently
best_when: Functional programming style with pipe/compose heavy codebases
Existing Ramda users wanting performance improvement
avoid_when: New TypeScript projects (Remeda or es-toolkit better choice)
summary: Rambda is a faster, smaller drop-in Ramda alternative with ~90% API compatibility. Auto-curried functions, R.pipe/compose/map/filter/groupBy. 2-10x faster than Ramda with ~200KB smaller bundle. TypeScript types. Best for Ramda projects wanting performance improvement. New TypeScript projects should consider Remeda or es-toolkit instead (better TypeScript ergonomics without mandatory currying).
